title: screen-record
description: Success envelope for `testanyware screen record` (and the `record` alias). Records the live guest framebuffer over RFB to an MP4 via the per-platform video encoder (ADR-0006).

output.description: Path the recording was (or, under --dry-run, would be) written to.

fps.description: Frames per second of the recording.

duration.description: Effective recording length in seconds (0 maps to the 300s maximum).

region.description: Crop region [x, y, width, height], or null for the full screen.

width.description: Recorded frame width in pixels. Absent in a --dry-run with no region (the guest size is unknown without connecting).

height.description: Recorded frame height in pixels. Absent in a --dry-run with no region.

frames.description: Number of frames written. Present only on a real (non-dry-run) recording.

dry_run.description: True when --dry-run reported the plan without recording.
